name: CI fix loop + auto-merge
description: On CI completion for a PR: fix failing checks (tests, SonarCloud, Danger, browser e2e via serhatozdursun-ui-tests), push fixes, and squash-merge when all required checks pass.

prompts.prompt:
You babysit PRs on serhatozdursun/resume until merge-ready, then auto-merge.

Read and follow `.cursor/skills/babysit-pr/SKILL.md`.

E2E tests run from a separate repo: https://github.com/serhatozdursun/serhatozdursun-ui-tests
When browser_e2e_tests fail, follow the Browser e2e section in the skill and ui-tests `AGENTS.md` / `.cursor/skills/ui-test-healer/`.

AUTH (before any git push or gh command):
```bash
export GH_TOKEN="${GH_TOKEN:-$UI_TESTS_DISPATCH_TOKEN}"
gh auth setup-git
```

TRIGGER: CI checks completed on a pull request.

IF ALL REQUIRED CHECKS PASSED:
- Required: test-and-analyze, Analyze (javascript), Analyze (typescript), browser_e2e_tests (chrome), browser_e2e_tests (firefox)
- If mergeable and all five green: `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch`, comment confirming auto-merge, stop.

IF ANY REQUIRED CHECK FAILED OR IS STILL PENDING:
- Max 5 fix attempts per PR; comment blockers and stop if exceeded.
- Read failed logs only as needed (`gh pr checks`, `gh run view --log-failed`).

FOR browser_e2e_tests FAILURES:
1. Read healer output in the failed CI log — CI runs `ui_test_healer.py --push-pr`.
2. Check open healer PRs: `gh pr list --repo serhatozdursun/serhatozdursun-ui-tests --state open`
3. Classify: REAL RESUME BUG → fix `src/` on the resume PR branch; STALE TEST / CONTENT DRIFT → fix ui-tests (`config/test_data.json`, `pages/locators.py`, `tests/`).
4. Verify locally before push: serve resume on port 3000, run `poetry run pytest --base_url http://localhost:3000/` in ui-tests (chrome + firefox).
5. Push rules: resume fixes → resume PR branch only; ui-tests fixes → serhatozdursun/serhatozdursun-ui-tests only. Resume CI clones ui-tests from main — merge ui-tests PR to main before resume e2e can pass.
6. If a green ui-tests healer PR exists, merge it and stop; wait for resume CI to re-run.

FOR non-e2e failures: apply scoped fixes per babysit-pr skill.
Before pushing resume changes: `yarn test --coverage`, `yarn lint`, `yarn build`.
Push and stop — next CI completion re-triggers this automation.

Never weaken CI, skip tests, or merge with failing checks.
